results.title: Wednesday, July 01, 2026 – edition no. 4982
results.description: * Innovation lab — Macau launches science and technology center to boost diversification push * Health | Covid-19 transmission rises as gov’t steps up vaccinations at care homes * Summer Events | July cultural and sports series launched, centered on families and youth * Macau braces for scorching heat, with highs of 32 degrees Celsius or above across the city over the next few days * Macau expands e-payment trials to transport, gov’t services, and campuses * The Cooperation Zone is entering a more demanding phase focused on execution, industrial rollout, and institutional integration, says Sam Hou Fai DOWNLOAD [...] The post Wednesday, July 01, 2026 – edition no. 4982 appeared first on MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報 .
